title: Glowing Hbm's NTM Ores
description: Makes ores in Hbm's Nuclear Tech Mod glow with shaders
body:
![Ore Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tbKUuUZY/images/8a581d24209a4874ff26ef2937efb59035ff1090.png)
This pack makes ores in [Hbm's Nuclear Tech Mod](https://github.com/HbmMods/Hbm-s-Nuclear-Tech-GIT) (and [NTM: Space](https://github.com/JameH2/Hbm-s-Nuclear-Tech-GIT)) glow.

It requires shaders that support seusPBR/oldPBR. [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) and [Complementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) are known to work.

I would also recommend using [Shader Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/shader-fixer) along with this, but thats optional.

If you're using Complementary, and you want to use Integrated PBR+ along with this, then in settings, go to Materials → IntegratedPBR+ Materials → Other IPBR+ Features, and switch IPBR+ Emissive Mode to seusPBR > IPBR+.

##

### How to use with Angelica:
On Angelica, using seusPBR with default settings causes visual errors.

If you're using Complementary, a workaround for this is to go in settings, then go to Materials → labPBR/seuspbr Materials, set Normal Map Strength to 0, and disable Parallax Occlusion Mapping.

##

If you have any issues or suggestions, then let me know!
